message:
🐛 fix(pipelines): correct event name for install dialog gate (#8473)

#8469 dispatched 'open-setup-dialog' but Layout.tsx listens for
'open-install'. Clicking + / x / manage in demo mode did nothing.

One-character fix: 'open-setup-dialog' → 'open-install'.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
